description: Defines the project's objectives, scope, stakeholders, and high-level risks. Establishes the PI's authority and initial budget allocation.
steps_to_create: Define project objectives and scope based on the SMART criteria
Identify key stakeholders and their roles
Outline high-level risks and mitigation strategies
Secure initial funding commitments
Obtain approval from the University of Bonn's ethics committee
approval_authorities: University of Bonn Ethics Committee, DFG Grant Review Board

description: Outlines safety procedures, alarm systems, and response protocols for the residential research unit. Aligns with AASM and GDPR standards.
steps_to_create: Conduct a safety audit of the residential facility
Define alarm response procedures for medical and environmental hazards
Develop protocols for data breach containment
Integrate with local emergency services
Validate against AASM sleep scoring guidelines
approval_authorities: Local Building Authority, Data Protection Authority

description: Balances data richness with participant comfort through tiered monitoring protocols. Includes sensor selection and PSG scheduling criteria.
steps_to_create: Define sensor deployment protocols (dry-electrode EEG, mattress sensors)
Develop adaptive PSG scheduling algorithm based on low-burden sensor data
Establish artifact management procedures
Validate against AASM sleep scoring criteria
Create data quality control checkpoints
approval_authorities: Sleep Neurophysiology Postdoctoral Researcher, Data Engineer

description: Determines optimal technician-to-participant ratios, shift schedules, and training requirements for overnight monitoring.
steps_to_create: Calculate required technician hours based on participant load
Develop shift rotation schedules
Define emergency response protocols
Create training curriculum for sleep scoring and equipment operation
Establish performance metrics for technician effectiveness
approval_authorities: Facility and Safety Manager, Clinical Psychologist

description: Identifies optimal participant sourcing channels while minimizing self-selection bias. Includes referral agreements and advertising guidelines.
document_template_primary: Society of Clinical Research Associates (SOCRA) Recruitment Guidelines
steps_to_create: Map regional neurologist networks and sleep clinics
Develop partnership agreements with medical institutions
Create targeted advertising content for patient advocacy groups
Establish referral incentive programs
Define inclusion/exclusion criteria for participant selection

description: Standardizes event scoring procedures, inter-rater reliability targets, and adjudication processes for parasomnia events.
steps_to_create: Define parasomnia event classification criteria
Establish dual-rater system with adjudication process
Develop training modules for raters
Set inter-rater reliability targets (e.g., Cohen's kappa ≥0.80)
Create audit trail for scoring decisions
approval_authorities: Data Engineer, Sleep Neurophysiology Postdoctoral Researcher
